name: Litigation Counsel
body: Plaintiff and recovery firms in the US, UK, and EU who instruct us as part of asset-tracing or enforcement matters.

name: Field Investigators
body: Licensed investigators on the ground in jurisdictions where in-person verification is required by counsel or court.

name: Forensic Accounting
body: Specialist accountants we co-engage for tracing flows of funds, related-party analysis, and quantum work.

name: Regional Intelligence
body: Language-specific research desks for primary-source coverage in Russian, Mandarin, Arabic, Portuguese and Spanish.
